articles.summary: 特朗普（川普）表示，應卡達、沙烏地阿拉伯等波灣國家請求，已取消原訂週二對伊朗的軍事攻擊，因為「嚴肅談判正在進行」。他強調伊朗絕不能擁有核武器，若無法達成協議，美國將準備全力大規模攻擊。

articles.title_original: 文革發動60週年：那十年，中國經歷了什麼？

articles.summary: 60年前，中共領導人毛澤東發動文化大革命，中國自此陷入長達十年的動亂。一場追求「民主」、「平等」，要建立理想社會的革命，為何最終會將整個民族拖入災難的深淵？

articles.title_original: 中国智能电视再陷监听争议 美媒重提隐私风险
articles.title_zh: 中国智能电视再陷监听争议，美媒重提隐私风险
articles.summary: 美国媒体AOL近日以“你的中国制电视可能正在监视你”为题报道，网络安全公司Bitdefender调查发现，部分中国制造智能电视可能在用户不知情情况下扫描家庭网络设备，并搜集相关数据。报道称，一些智能电视除记录用户观看习惯外，还会搜索同一Wi-Fi网络中的手机、电脑、游戏机以及其他智能家电。研究人员指出，部分设备会定期扫描家庭网络环境。熟悉互联网技术的邢鉴接受本台采访时说：“国产智能电视遥控器如果有麦克风，它可以搜集你的声音，还有根据你个人喜好（频道内容）分析你、定位等，被中共方面搜集信息。另外还有，如果用中国商品APP软件，它会读取你的信息存放到服务器，会造成你的数据泄露。APP还会自动获取你

articles.title_original: 中国文革60周年：从“五一六”到今天
articles.title_zh: 中国文革60周年：从“五一六”到今天
articles.summary: 今年是中共领导人毛泽东发动“文化大革命”60周年。1966年5月16日，中共中央发布“五一六通知”，通常被视为文革正式启动的重要节点。文件提出警惕党内“资产阶级代表人物”，强调阶级斗争。6月1日，中共党报《人民日报》发表《横扫一切牛鬼蛇神》社论。此后，北京高校和中学陆续出现群众组织，文革逐渐由党内整风扩大为全国政治运动。60年后，多位文革亲历者接受采访时表示，文革并非突然爆发，而是此前历次政治运动长期累积后的结果。他们认为，今天社会对于文革的讨论，仍有许多被忽视的历史细节。谈及文革与“五一六通知”的关系，中国独立作家王继本周日（17日）接受本台采访时说，文革并非突然发生，而是在此前政治运动基础

articles.summary: Google is transforming Search from a list of links into an AI-powered experience filled with conversational answers, autonomous agents, and interactive interfaces — a shift that could further reduce traffic to publishers across the web.

articles.title_original: Google’s AI Studio now lets anyone build Android apps in minutes
articles.title_zh: 谷歌AI Studio让任何人都能在几分钟内构建安卓应用
articles.summary: Google unveiled new web-based AI tools that can generate native Android apps in minutes, as the company expands its push into AI-powered software development.

articles.title_original: Google updates its Gemini app to take on ChatGPT and Claude at IO 2026
articles.title_zh: 谷歌在IO 2026更新Gemini应用以对抗ChatGPT和Claude
articles.summary: The updates signal Google’s push to turn its Gemini app into an all-purpose AI hub rather than a stand-alone chatbot.

articles.title_original: Agentic app coding gets an upgrade with Google’s release of Android CLI
articles.title_zh: 谷歌发布Android CLI，升级智能体应用编码
articles.summary: Google is embracing the rise of AI coding agents with new Android tools designed to work with platforms like Claude Code and OpenAI’s Codex, allowing developers — or their AI assistants — to build Android apps faster from the command line.

articles.title_original: Google’s new Universal Cart wants to follow your entire shopping journey across the internet
articles.title_zh: 谷歌推出Universal Cart，追踪用户全网购物旅程
articles.summary: Most people shop across multiple devices, many retailers, and over the course of many days, which is why Google is launching Universal Cart.

articles.title_original: Google introduces Gemini Spark, a 24/7 agentic assistant with Gmail integration, at IO 2026
articles.title_zh: 谷歌在IO 2026推出集成Gmail的24/7智能助手Gemini Spark
articles.summary: At the Google I/O developer conference, the company announced a new agentic personal assistant called Gemini Spark, built from Gemini's base models and an agentic harness from Google Antigravity.

articles.title_original: Google adds voice-based prompting to Docs and Keep
articles.title_zh: 谷歌为Docs和Keep添加语音输入功能
articles.summary: Google is letting users create drafts, take notes, and search for email with voice with the new Workspace update.

articles.title_original: Google launches Antigravity 2.0 with an updated desktop app and CLI tool at IO 2026
articles.title_zh: 谷歌在IO 2026发布Antigravity 2.0，更新桌面应用和CLI工具
articles.summary: Google is debuting a new AI Ultra plan priced at $100, which will give users 5x more usage limit than the AI Pro plan alongside the Antigravity 2.0 launch.

articles.title_original: Google’s Gemini Omni turns images, audio, and text into video — and that’s just the start
articles.title_zh: 谷歌Gemini Omni将图像、音频和文本转化为视频
articles.summary: Google's Gemini Omni is a new multimodal model that reasons across text, images, audio, and video to generate and edit videos through simple conversation — starting with Omni Flash.

articles.title_original: OpenAI is making it easier to check if an image was made by their models
articles.title_zh: OpenAI简化AI生成图像溯源验证
articles.summary: OpenAI announced two new measures to help detect AI generated imagery: joining the open C2PA standard and adding Google's SynthID to its products.

articles.title_original: 30-Year Yield Rises as Bond Selloff Deepens
articles.title_zh: 30年期美债收益率因债券抛售加剧而上升
articles.summary: Yields on the US Treasury’s longest-dated bond rose to the highest level in almost two decades as investor concerns mount that accelerating inflation will force central bankers to raise interest rates. Bloomberg's Mark Cranfield breaks down the situation. (Source: Bloomberg)

articles.title_original: Asian Stocks Set to Drop as Bond Selloff Extends: Markets Wrap

articles.summary: Japanese stocks are under pressure as long-term interest rates approach 3%, levels which are stoking fears about a hit to corporate earnings via increased borrowing costs.
